notes: Sample files processed to establish pattern
Most files already have cm data
Most files already have full alpha ranges (-4° to +16°)
Remaining files can be processed using same pattern

processing_pattern.metadata: Add meta object with source, generated_at, filter, notes, cm_estimated, stall_alpha
processing_pattern.cm_estimation: Only for files missing cm (clarky, s1223)
processing_pattern.alpha_extension: Only for files with max alpha < 14°
